title: CNT 4104 – Computer Information Networks
text: 3/29/26, 12.25 AM CNT 4104 Computer Information Networks University of South Florida CNT 4104 Computer Information Networks Credit(s): 3 Presents the design and analysis of computer networks The emphasis is on application- and Internet-layer protocols. Network interfaces, Internet protocols, wireless networks, routing; and security issues are introduced: Prerequisite(s): CQP3515 (min grade C) Corequisite(s): CNT4104L https Ilcatalog usf edulpreview course_nopop php?catoid-23&coid-103453&print 1/1
